title: rhoso-apps Helm chart values
description: Validated against templates/ and the documentation block in values.yaml.

applicationNamespace.description: Namespace for Argo CD Application CRs (metadata.namespace).

destinationServer.description: Kubernetes API server URL for spec.destination.server.

applications.description: Map of Application name to Argo CD Application settings.

propertyNames.description: DNS-1123 label: lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens (e.g. openstack-operator-cr).

enabled.description: If true, render an Application CR.

path.description: Path inside the repo; empty string uses chart default '.'.

targetRevision.description: Branch, tag, or commit; empty string uses chart default 'HEAD'.

syncWave.description: Value for argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave annotation. Omit to use default wave 0 in the rendered Application.

syncOptions.description: Argo CD sync option strings. Used for spec.syncPolicy.syncOptions when syncPolicy is not set or is an empty object; ignored when syncPolicy is a non-empty object (use syncPolicy.syncOptions).

project.description: Optional Argo CD AppProject; default in chart is 'default' if omitted.

syncPolicy.description: When non-empty, the map is rendered as spec.syncPolicy in full; top-level syncOptions is not merged in. For syncOptions only, omit syncPolicy or set it to {} and set top-level syncOptions.

kustomize.description: Optional Argo CD spec.source.kustomize overrides (see Argo CD Kustomize user guide).

finalizers.description: Argo CD Application metadata.finalizers (resources finalizer). Omit to use chart default (background).
